context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Storage System at /armazenamento with CRUD operations for folders and files (endpoints: /api/storage/list, /api/storage/folder, /api/storage/upload, /api/storage/download, /api/storage/delete, /api/storage/rename). 2) Aluguel contract features: numero_contrato field and contract file upload/download (endpoints: /api/admin/alugueis/{id}/contrato, /api/admin/alugueis/{id}/contrato/download). All features working correctly.
